files.patch:
@@ -8,7 +8,12 @@ on:
 
 jobs:
   build:
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
+
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
@@ -21,3 +26,4 @@ jobs:
       - run: pnpm run lint
       - run: pnpm run test
       - run: pnpm run build
+        if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest'
